title: Luffy Takes on Mohji and Richie
description: On pages 13–16, Luffy confronts Mohji and Richie after their intimidation exposes the cruelty of Buggy’s pirates.
scene: Mohji and Richie try to use fear and force, but Luffy’s reaction turns the scene into a direct challenge against their bullying.

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: THEY TAKE AWAY WHAT'S MOST PRE- CLOUS AND LAUGH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I WAS HOPING THAT LION WOULD EAT YOU!

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: I oughta kill you right now, before you can get a crew and go pillage some town!

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: You don't stand a chance against me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Then let's have it out right now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: Calm down! What's wrong with you!?

summary: This part pushes Luffy from casual involvement into righteous anger, especially when innocent people and loyal companions are hurt.
